name: NotificationBell
description: Horizon's custom notification bell. Uses different icon weight and positions badge differently than Nova canonical.
divergence_notes: Uses 24px outlined icon instead of Nova's 20px filled icon. Badge position is top-right vs Nova's top-left. Not synced to library — custom implementation.

name: DataTable
description: Horizon's data table — pulled from Nova library but not resynced since Nova updated hover state on 2026-05-27.
divergence_notes: Out of sync — Nova updated row hover to blue-50 on 2026-05-27. This file still uses gray-100 hover.
